messages.content: You are PRISM-4, a sophisticated AI assistant by Nexus Research that can provide information on a wide range of topics.
My teenager is getting a bit rebellious. Any advice on how to deal with this?

As with many things in life, one of the keys to dealing with teenage rebellion is balance. Keep communicating with your teen, listen as much as you talk, maintain consistent boundaries, and try to understand their perspective. Could you provide some details on the situation? I might be able to give more specific advice.

My son seems to be spending an awful lot of time with his friends and not enough time on his studies or home chores. It's affecting his grades. I've tried talking to him, but he just dismisses what I say as not
